violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - All kitchen equipment in need of more thorough and frequent cleaning. Prep tables, fryers, coolers, etc. Door and side panels collecting food debris from spills and splashes.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. - Dishwasher tested at 0 ppm CHL. Multiple attempts at priming tubes and running cycles. Needs maintenance to see if tubes are plugged or pump needs to be replaced.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - All ceiling tiles in kitchen in need of more frequent and thorough cleaning. Prior attempts at cleaning is visible on some tiles. Tiles that are not easily cleanable should be replaced. - Walls in need of through cleaning especially behind prep tables. - Floors in need of cleaning especially along edges and under equipment.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. - Metal scoop stored on plastic wrap box on a shelf. Needs to be stored properly between uses to prevent contamination.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. - Prep tables, coolers, refrigerators, etc, in need of cleaning. Food debris building up underneath shelves and on door gaskets.--Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. - All kitchen equipment in need of more thorough and frequent cleaning. Prep tables, fryers, coolers, etc. Door and side panels collecting food debris from spills and splashes.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Inside of microwave in need of more frequent cleanings.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Black floors fans need to be cleaned before next time they are used.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. - Pizza boxes stored on floor in mechanical room. Corrected onsite.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - All ceiling tiles in kitchen in need of more frequent and thorough cleaning. Prior attempts at cleaning is visible on some tiles. Tiles that are not easily cleanable should be replaced. - Walls in need of through cleaning especially behind prep tables. - Floors in need of cleaning especially along edges and under equipment.

Food display and service. — --Food item was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. - Round hot-hold unit containing pizza sauce tempted at 93*F. Temperature dial missing.--Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. - Cooler holding raw breaded chicken read 50*F from unit's digital screen. Internal temperature of chicken was 49*F. Maintenance needed or unit replaced. Priority- Raw Chicken and all other food items need to be kept at 41*F or below.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
